---
title: "Nonparametric Models"
format:
  html: default
  revealjs:
    output-file: nonparametric-models-slides.html
  pdf:
    output-file: nonparametric-models-handout.pdf
  docx:
    output-file: nonparametric-models-handout.docx

---

{{< include shared-config.qmd >}}

---

# Empirical CDF and quantiles

{{< include _subfiles/estimation/_sec_empirical_quantiles.qmd >}}
